provenance.source_corpus: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

source_spans.text: Seed addition caused a small but significant increase in total cover of natives
Seed addition caused a small but significant increase in total cover of natives
Seed addition increased total native richness across all treatments

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:20b162bd1f2f
edges.original_sentence: Seed addition caused a small but significant increase in total cover of natives; unseeded plots averaged 22.4%, while seeded plots averaged 24%

source_spans.text: Seed addition caused a small but significant increase in total cover of natives; unseeded plots averaged 22.4%, while seeded plots averaged 24%

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:20b162bd1f2f
edges.original_sentence: Seed addition increased total native richness across all treatments, with a mean plot richness of 12.9 species in seeded plots and 9.5 species in unseeded plots

source_spans.text: Seed addition increased total native richness across all treatments, with a mean plot richness of 12.9 species in seeded plots and 9.5 species in unseeded plots

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:c2984fc8f016
edges.original_sentence: Sethoxydim combined with fall mowing reduced non-native grasses, caused no change in non-native forbs, and increased total cover of native plants.

source_spans.text: Sethoxydim combined with fall mowing reduced non-native grasses, caused no change in non-native forbs, and increased total cover of native plants.

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:c2984fc8f016
edges.original_sentence: Sethoxydim combined with fall mowing reduced non-native grasses, caused no change in non-native forbs, and increased total cover of native plants.

source_spans.text: Sethoxydim combined with fall mowing reduced non-native grasses, caused no change in non-native forbs, and increased total cover of native plants.

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:bfada30ab3a1
edges.original_sentence: The most disturbance-intensive treatment combination (joint application of sethoxydim, burning, and postfire glyphosate) led to reduced abundance of non-native grasses and forbs without causing a decline in native species.

source_spans.text: The most disturbance-intensive treatment combination (joint application of sethoxydim, burning, and postfire glyphosate) led to reduced abundance of non-native grasses and forbs without causing a decline in native species.

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:b9b78df93f53
edges.original_sentence: A significant reduction in non-native grasses did result when mowing was combined with burning and glyphosate application (MBG).

source_spans.text: A significant reduction in non-native grasses did result when mowing was combined with burning and glyphosate application (MBG).

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:f5af8f1644f5
edges.original_sentence: In all cases, disturbance treatments reduced non-native cover to varying degrees but had no positive impact on native diversity except when seeds were added.

source_spans.text: In all cases, disturbance treatments reduced non-native cover to varying degrees but had no positive impact on native diversity except when seeds were added.

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:f5af8f1644f5
edges.original_sentence: Disturbance treatments had no effect on native or non-native species richness (Appendix 1).

source_spans.text: Disturbance treatments had no effect on native or non-native species richness (Appendix 1).

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:bfada30ab3a1
edges.original_sentence: While all disturbance treatments reduced the cover of litter, only treatments that included burning and glyphosate (SBG and MBG) resulted in a significant decrease in moss cover (Figure 3).

source_spans.text: While all disturbance treatments reduced the cover of litter, only treatments that included burning and glyphosate (SBG and MBG) resulted in a significant decrease in moss cover (Figure 3).

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:bfada30ab3a1
edges.original_sentence: Bare soil increased only in the SBG and MBG treatments (Figure 3).

source_spans.text: Bare soil increased only in the SBG and MBG treatments (Figure 3).

source_document.title: Multiple Treatment Combinations and Seed Addition Increase Abundance and Diversity of Native Plants in Pacific Northwest Prairies
